goal: Update /implement to use the parallelizable hint, update /status to display claim age with stale indicator, and document version pinning.

tasks.name: Update /implement detection logic for parallelizable flag
tasks.action: Update Step 1c team-mode detection to use parallelizable field from plan JSON.

tasks.name: Update /status to display claim age
tasks.action: Enhance the Team Implementation Progress section to show claim age for active tasks with stale indicator.

tasks.name: Document version pinning in PROJECT.md and CLAUDE.md
tasks.action: Add Agent Teams version pin constraint and env var documentation.

commitMessage:
feat(multi-agent-enhancements): command logic and version pinning docs

- Update /implement to use parallelizable hint from plan JSON
- Update /status to display claim age with stale indicator
- Document Agent Teams version pinning in PROJECT.md and CLAUDE.md
